title: The Bootstrap Resampling Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of bootstrap resampling to estimate the sampling distribution of a statistic and calculate confidence intervals.
relationships: Original Sample is resampled with replacement to create each Bootstrap Sample
Each Bootstrap Sample is used to calculate a Bootstrap Statistic (θ*)
All Bootstrap Statistics are collected to form the Estimated Sampling Distribution
The Estimated Sampling Distribution is used to calculate the final Confidence Interval
